title: KLAUS
description: simple mod that adds an evil santa klaus bossfigh
body:
So this mod was developped in a very short time, so don't judge lol.

NEEDS GECKOLIB 4.5.7 !!!!!! 

The klaus spawn egg is creative only

When you start the bossfight, don't let him sneak behind you, or he will teleport you at your spawn and you'll loose all your items (without dying).

This mod was just for a funny bossfight, so nothing drops at klaus death.

Hope you'll enjoy

Thanks to Lanista for the sounds, model and animations
